response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with diverse project experience, including AI-agent infrastructure and open-source contributions. However, the role requires a Principal Engineer with deep AI/ML expertise, cloud strategy leadership, and 15 years of experience, which the candidate partially meets but lacks explicit evidence of AI-driven product leadership or director-level impact.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source projects
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product leadership or recognized expertise in AI-driven platforms
Seniority (14 years) slightly below the 15-year requirement
Lacks advanced degrees in AI-related fields or cloud strategy focus
